G5073.derivation: from G5064 (τέσσαρες) and a derivative of the base of G4118 (πλεῖστος);

G5024.derivation: neuter plural of G3588 (ὁ) and G846 (αὐτός) as adverb;

G5044.derivation: from a compound of G5043 (τέκνον) and G5142 (τρέφω);
G5044.strongs_def: to be a childrearer, i.e. fulfil the duties of a female parent

G5040.strongs_def: an infant, i.e. (plural figuratively) darlings (Christian converts)

G5078.strongs_def: art (as productive), i.e. (specially), a trade, or (generally) skill

G5057.strongs_def: a tax-farmer, i.e. collector of public revenue

G5065.derivation: from G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G2532 (καί) and G1182 (δέκατος);

G5081.derivation: adverb from a compound of a derivative of G5056 (τέλος) and G827 (αὐγή);
G5081.strongs_def: in a far-shining manner, i.e. plainly

G5014.kjv_def: humiliation, be made low, low estate, vile

G5083.strongs_def: perhaps akin to G2334 (θεωρέω)); to guard (from loss or injury, properly, by keeping the eye upon; and thus differing from G5442 (φυλάσσω), which is properly to prevent escaping; and from G2892 (κουστωδία), which implies a fortress or full military lines of apparatus), i.e. to note (a prophecy; figuratively, to fulfil a command); by implication, to detain (in custody; figuratively, to maintain); by extension, to withhold (for personal ends; figuratively, to keep unmarried); by extension, to withhold (for personal ends; figuratively, to keep unmarried)
G5083.kjv_def: hold fast, keep(- er), (pre-, re-)serve, watch
G5083.usage: keep(57x), reserve(8x), observe(4x), watch(2x), preserve(2x), keeper(1x)

G5000.strongs_def: the gazelle; Tabitha (i.e. Tabjetha), a Christian female

G5011.strongs_def: depressed, i.e. (figuratively) humiliated (in circumstances or disposition)
G5011.kjv_def: base, cast down, humble, of low degree (estate), lowly

G5058.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G5057 (τελώνης);

G5035.strongs_def: shortly, i.e. without delay, soon, or (by surprise) suddenly, or (by implication, of ease) readily

G5010.strongs_def: regular arrangement, i.e. (in time) fixed succession (of rank or character), official dignity

G5041.derivation: from a compound of G5043 (τέκνον) and the base of G1096 (γίνομαι);
G5041.strongs_def: to be a child-bearer, i.e. parent (mother)

G5026.derivation: dative case, accusative case and genitive case respectively of the feminine singular of G3778 (οὗτος);
G5026.kjv_def: her, + hereof, it, that, + thereby, the (same), this (same)

G5046.strongs_def: complete (in various applications of labor, growth, mental and moral character, etc.); neuter (as noun, with G3588 (ὁ)) completeness

G5087.derivation: a prolonged form of a primary (which is used only as alternate in certain tenses);
G5087.strongs_def: to place (in the widest application, literally and figuratively; properly, in a passive or horizontal posture, and thus different from G2476 (ἵστημι), which properly denotes an upright and active position, while G2749 (κεῖμαι) is properly reflexive and utterly prostrate)
G5087.kjv_def: + advise, appoint, bow, commit, conceive, give, X kneel down, lay (aside, down, up), make, ordain, purpose, put, set (forth), settle, sink down

G5009.derivation: neuter contraction of a presumed derivative of (a dispenser or distributor;
G5009.strongs_def: akin to , to cut); a dispensary or magazine, i.e. a chamber on the ground-floor or interior of an Oriental house (generally used for storage or privacy, a spot for retirement)

G5084.strongs_def: a watching, i.e. (figuratively) observance, or (concretely) a prison

G5038.derivation: akin to the base of G5088 (τίκτω);
G5038.strongs_def: a wall (as formative of a house)

G5053.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G5055 (τελέω);
G5053.strongs_def: to finish life (by implication, of G979 (βίος)), i.e. expire (demise)

G5012.derivation: from a compound of G5011 (ταπεινός) and the base of G5424 (φρήν);
G5012.kjv_def: humbleness of mind, humility (of mind, loneliness (of mind)

G5019.derivation: perhaps the same as (a flat basket);
G5019.strongs_def: Tarsus, a place in Asia Minor

G5086.strongs_def: probably pertaining to the river Tiberis or Tiber; Tiberius, a Roman emperor

G5092.strongs_def: a value, i.e. money paid, or (concretely and collectively) valuables; by analogy, esteem (especially of the highest degree), or the dignity itself

G5085.strongs_def: Tiberias, the name of a town and a lake in Palestine

G5076.strongs_def: the ruler of a fourth part of a country ("tetrarch")

G5032.derivation: neuter singular of the comparative of G5036 (ταχύς) (as adverb);
G5032.strongs_def: more swiftly, i.e. (in manner) more rapidly, or (in time) more speedily

G5039.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of (a goal or fixed limit);
G5039.strongs_def: a token (as defining a fact), i.e. criterion of certainty

G5003.strongs_def: to be wretched, i.e. realize one's own misery

G5099.derivation: strengthened for a primary (which is only used as an alternate in certain tenses);
G5099.strongs_def: to pay a price, i.e. as a penalty

G5030.strongs_def: briefly, i.e. (in time) speedily, or (in manner) rapidly

G5029.derivation: as if neuter plural of G5036 (ταχύς) (adverbially);

G5056.derivation: from a primary (to set out for a definite point or goal);
G5056.strongs_def: properly, the point aimed at as a limit, i.e. (by implication) the conclusion of an act or state (termination (literally, figuratively or indefinitely), result (immediate, ultimate or prophetic), purpose); specially, an impost or levy (as paid)

G5016.strongs_def: disturbance, i.e. (of water) roiling, or (of a mob) sedition

G5088.derivation: a strengthened form of a primary (which is used only as alternate in certain tenses);
G5088.strongs_def: to produce (from seed, as a mother, a plant, the earth, etc.), literally or figuratively
G5088.kjv_def: bear, be born, bring forth, be delivered, be in travail

G5048.strongs_def: to complete, i.e. (literally) accomplish, or (figuratively) consummate (in character)

G5050.strongs_def: (the act) completion, i.e. (of prophecy) verification, or (of expiation) absolution

G5069.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of (a tetrad;
G5069.strongs_def: from G5064 (τέσσαρες)); a quaternion or squad (picket) of four Roman soldiers

G5055.strongs_def: to end, i.e. complete, execute, conclude, discharge (a debt)
G5055.kjv_def: accomplish, make an end, expire, fill up, finish, go over, pay, perform
G5055.usage: finish(8x), fulfil(7x), accomplish(4x), pay(2x), perform(1x), expire(1x)

G5013.strongs_def: to depress; figuratively, to humiliate (in condition or heart)

G5001.strongs_def: something orderly in arrangement (a troop), i.e. (figuratively) a series or succession

G5045.strongs_def: an artificer (as producer of fabrics), i.e. (specially), a craftsman in wood

G5042.strongs_def: childbirth (parentage), i.e. (by implication) maternity (the performance of maternal duties)

G5037.derivation: a primary particle (enclitic) of connection or addition;
G5037.strongs_def: both or also (properly, as correlation of G2532 (καί))
G5037.kjv_def: also, and, both, even, then, whether
G5037.usage: and(130x), both(36x), then(2x), whether(1x), even(1x), also(1x)

G5005.derivation: from the base of G5007 (τάλαντον) and a derivative of the base of G3984 (πεῖρα);

G5018.strongs_def: a Tarsean, i.e. native of Tarsus

G5082.derivation: from a compound of G3588 (ὁ) with G2245 (ἡλίκος) and G3778 (οὗτος);
G5082.strongs_def: such as this, i.e. (in (figurative) magnitude) so vast

G5091.strongs_def: to prize, i.e. fix a valuation upon; by implication, to revere

G5097.derivation: from a comparative of G5092 (τιμή) and ouros (a guard);
G5097.strongs_def: properly, to protect one's honor, i.e. to avenge (inflict a penalty)

G5033.derivation: neuter plural of the superlative of G5036 (ταχύς) (as adverb);
G5033.strongs_def: most quickly, i.e. (with G5613 (ὡς) prefixed) as soon as possible

G5093.strongs_def: valuable, i.e. (objectively) costly, or (subjectively) honored, esteemed, or (figuratively) beloved
G5093.kjv_def: dear, honourable, (more, most) precious, had in reputation

G5023.derivation: nominative or accusative case neuter plural of G3778 (οὗτος);
G5023.kjv_def: + afterward, follow, + hereafter, X him, the same, so, such, that, then, these, they, this, those, thus

G5021.derivation: a prolonged form of a primary verb (which latter appears only in certain tenses);
G5021.strongs_def: to arrange in an orderly manner, i.e. assign or dispose (to a certain position or lot)

G5089.derivation: perhaps akin to the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι), and thus to G4951 (σύρω);

G5007.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of the original form of (to bear;
G5007.strongs_def: equivalent to G5342 (φέρω)); a balance (as supporting weights), i.e. (by implication) a certain weight (and thence a coin or rather sum of money) or "talent"

G5095.strongs_def: dear to God; Timotheus, a Christian

G5034.strongs_def: a brief space (of time), i.e. (with G1722 (ἐν) prefixed) in haste

G5025.derivation: dative case and accusative case feminine plural respectively of G3778 (οὗτος);
G5025.strongs_def: (to or with or by, etc.) these

G5072.derivation: neuter of a compound of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G3376 (μήν);

G5008.strongs_def: the fresh, i.e. young girl; talitha (O maiden)

G5052.derivation: from a compound of G5056 (τέλος) and G5342 (φέρω);
G5052.strongs_def: to be a bearer to completion (maturity), i.e. to ripen fruit (figuratively)

G5070.derivation: from the multiplicative adverb of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G5507 (χίλιοι);
